items.prompt: Compute total FY2025 NET revenue for the Maritime segment: all Revenue for Maritime entities, excluding intercompany sales. Map entities to segments using the Entities tab.
Compute FY2025 EBITDA for the Aviation segment: net revenue (excluding intercompany) minus COGS minus OpEx. EBITDA EXCLUDES Depreciation & Amortization (D&A).
Which segment had the highest FY2025 EBITDA (net revenue excluding intercompany, minus COGS and OpEx, excluding D&A)? Answer with the segment name only.
Compute total Q4 2025 (October, November, December) OpEx across ALL segments. Exclude D&A.
